title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, September 02 2025
summary:
Main
Bulkers: Values have firmed slightly this week, with smaller tonnage seeing the biggest increasedue to second-hand sales such as Atilla
Panamax BC Navios Hope (75,400 DWT, Jun 2005, Universal) sold SS/DD Passed to undisclosed buyers for USD 8.5 mil, VV Value USD 9.68 mil
Supramax BC African Jacana (58,800 DWT, Oct 2012, Nantong COSCO KHI) sold DD due to undisclosed buyers for USD 16 mil, VV value USD 15.91 mil
Handy BC Atilla (37,900 DWT, Mar 2011, Samho Tongyoung) sold to unknown Greek buyers for USD 13.2 mil, VV Value USD 12.27 mil
Tankers: Tanker values fluctuating this week with modern MR values firming reflecting strong demand for younger units
Suezmax Sofia (165,000 DWT, Oct 2010, Hyundai Samho HI) sold SS/DD Due to Great Eastern Shipping for USD 39.8 mil, VV Value USD 40.7 mil
LR2 Tanker Pacific Sky (115,400 DWT, Mar 2009, STX Offshore) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 32 mil, VV Value USD 32.2 mil
MR2 Tanker STI Maestro (50,000 DWT, Jan 2020, Hyundai Vietnam Shipbuilding) sold to Venergy Maritime for USD 42 mil, VV Value USD 40.2 mil
Containers: Older Handy Container values dip this week following a couple of recent sales
Handy Container UGL Guangzhou (1,618 TEU,
